Description: This is an N-Channel MOSFET utilizing Trench Power Technology, optimized for fast-switching applications such as synchronous rectification in DC/DC and AC/DC converters. It features a low on-state resistance (Rds(on)) and low gate charge, enabling high efficiency and performance in power conversion circuits.

KeyParameters.Total Gate Charge (Qg): (Not provided in excerpt, but implied as "Low Gate Charge")

Functions.FunctionDescription: Control terminal for switching the MOSFET
Output / High-current terminal, connected to the load/power rail
Common / Ground terminal, return path for current
